description: Calculate building age diversity by zone and test its relationship with commercial vitality (Jacobs Index) using San Francisco data in the Jupyter notebook at /home/ga/urbansim_projects/notebooks/jacobs_analysis.ipynb. Using the 'buildings' and 'parcels' data from /home/ga/urbansim_projects/data/sanfran_public.h5, compute zone-level metrics for areas with at least 20 valid buildings (defined as records with a year_built of 1850 or later). The analysis must determine the Age Diversity Index (standard deviation of year_built), the percentage of buildings built before 1950, and commercial density (total non-residential square footage per parcel). Perform an OLS regression testing the impact of age diversity and old building percentage on commercial density. Save the regression summary to /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/jacobs_regression.txt, a scatter plot of age diversity vs. commercial density to /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/jacobs_scatter.png, and the final metrics (zone_id, num_buildings, age_diversity, old_building_pct, total_commercial_sqft, num_parcels, commercial_density) to /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/jacobs_metrics.csv. Ensure all notebook cells are executed.
